creator: jinking.this@gmail.com
text:
The recent community version has been updated to 2023.3.4. Building with this version will fail with error message:


>install  -s -m 0644 /usr/ports/java/intellij/work/idea-IC-233.14475.28/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/lib/jansi-native/freebsd32/libjansi.so  /usr/ports/java/intellij/work/stage/usr/local/share/intellij/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/lib/jansi-native/freebsd32/
> install: /usr/ports/java/intellij/work/idea-IC-233.14475.28/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/lib/jansi-native/freebsd32/libjansi.so: No such file or directory

$ ls /usr/ports/java/intellij/work/idea-IC-233.14475.28/plugins/maven/lib/maven3/lib/jansi-native/
README.txt      Windows
